description_long: This is a small, fixed-wing airplane with a straight, mid-mounted wing configuration and a compact fuselage. The wings are painted in a light color with visible markings, while the fuselage features a contrasting, darker central section. The airplane has a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a canopy or windshield visible. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller nose wheel. The overall design suggests a light utility or trainer aircraft, suitable for short-range flights.
description: A small, light-colored fixed-wing airplane with a mid-mounted wing, conventional tail, and front cockpit. It features fixed tricycle landing gear and a compact, streamlined fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight wings, central cockpit, and nose wheel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, fixed landing gear, and tail assembly.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail configuration and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wing and landing gear profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy
